parsedContent.feedback: Excellent job! Your answer demonstrates a thorough understanding of the steps to prepare safe drinking water at home. Your steps are accurate, complete, and well-organized.
parsedContent.correctedAnswer: Prepare materials, Boil the water, Purify water, Put water in the clean container. Model: Clean all materials to be used. Boil water in a well-covered container. Let the water cool until it is warm. Filter water with a clean filter or sieve. Keep the drinking water in a very clean and covered container. Drink water using a clean cup or glass.
